title: Proclamation No. 441, s. 2003
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 441

DECLARING AND CONSOLIDATING BUHISAN WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE ESTABLISHED UNDER EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 36 DATED JULY 13, 1911, SUDLON NATIONAL PARK ESTABLISHED UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 56 DATED APRIL 11, 1936, CENTRAL CEBU NATIONAL PARK ESTABLISHED UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 202 DATED SEPTEMBER 15, 1937, MANANGA WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE ESTABLISHED UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 502 DATED DECEMBER 5, 1989, AND KOTKOT-LUSARAN WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE ESTABLISHED UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 932 DATED JUNE 29, 1992 SITUATED IN THE CITIES OF CEBU, TALISAY, TOLEDO, AND DANAO AND IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MINGLANILLA, CONSOLACION, LILOAN, COMPOSTELA AND BALAMBAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO ONE PROTECTED AREA PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7586 (NIPAS ACT OF 1992), UNDER THE CATEGORY OF PROTECTED LANDSCAPE TO BE KNOWN AS THE CENTRAL CEBU PROTECTED LANDSCAPE

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources and pursuant to the powers vested upon me by law, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL ARROYO , President of the Philippines, do hereby set aside, declare and consolidate the aforecited five (5) reservations into one (1) protected area, located in the Cities of Cebu, Talisay, Toledo and Danao and in the Municipalities of Minglanilla, Consolacion, Liloan, Compostela and Balamban, Province of Cebu, as Protected Area under the category as Protected Landscape, subject to private rights and without prejudice to the rights of the Indigenous People as provided for in R.A. 8371, DENR Administrative Order No. 93-02 and other rules and regulations if any, consisting of Parcel “A” and Parcel “B” described as follows:

TECHNICAL DESCRIPTION

PARCEL “A”

Note: All corner points were derived using GIS and UTM Coordinate of Corner No. 1 is 1160802.63N and 597191.56E

beginning, containing an area of Twenty Eight Thousand Four Hundred Fifty Two (28,452) hectares.

PARCEL B

Note: Coordinate of Corner 1 is (UTM) 1143252.00 N and 592478.75E

the point of beginning, containing an area of Six Hundred Ten (610) hectares.

Parcels A and B shall have a consolidated area of Twenty Nine Thousand Sixty (29,062) hectares , more or less, subject to actual ground survey.

The Central Cebu Protected Landscape (CCPL) shall be under the jurisdiction of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) and shall be managed in accordance with the provisions of R.A. 7586 dated June 1, 1992 otherwise known as the NIPAS Act of 1992.

All contracts, permits or licenses for the extraction or utilization of natural resources already existing prior to this proclamation shall, subject to national interest, be respected until its expiration.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines.

Done in the City of Manila, this 12 th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Three.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) ALBERTO G. ROMULO Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
